## Summary

Describe the change and why it matters.

## Scientific / engineering motivation

Explain the research or software-quality problem addressed by this pull request.

## Maturity label

- [ ] Implemented
- [ ] Prototype
- [ ] Planned / documentation only

## Validation

- [ ] `ruff check src tests experiments`
- [ ] `black --check src tests experiments`
- [ ] `pytest`
- [ ] Reproducible experiment command included, if results are reported
- [ ] Configs, seeds, and raw outputs included, if benchmark numbers are reported

## Result reporting policy

- [ ] This PR does not claim benchmark results.
- [ ] Or: benchmark results are generated by committed scripts and include configs, seeds, and outputs.

## Documentation

- [ ] README/docs updated
- [ ] Changelog updated
